description:
21K likes, 62 comments - satoribjjacademy on March 12, 2026: "💡A focused mind is a powerful one!⚡️🧠⤵️

Through Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, kids learn how to stay present, follow instructions, and react with confidence. These are skills that go far beyond the mats and into everyday life.

Strong body. Sharp mind. Confident kids. 🧠⚡️🥋

📍Satori BJJ Academy – Phoenix, AZ 
☎️ (602) 657-1067 
🌐 https://satoribjjacademy.com

#oss #bjjkids #jiujitsu #phoenix".
